backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex ICP/ckUSDT grid trading bot with configurable interval, spread, and order count, using recurring timers to run a trading loop that fetches order book data and places buy/sell grid orders.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON file containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the trading bot dashboard UI.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, border, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering a sticky header, footer, and a responsive dashboard layout composing BotControlPanel, ConfigurationPanel, MarketDataPanel, and GridPreviewTable.
React panel component displaying bot running/stopped status with animated indicator and Start/Stop buttons that call the corresponding backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: React form panel for editing and saving bot configuration fields (intervalSeconds, spreadBps, numOrders) with client-side validation and success/error feedback.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a sorted table of the bot's current grid orders (buys and sells) with badges showing order counts, loading skeletons, and a refresh button.
Shows the latest mid price for the ICP/ckUSDT pair along with exchange info, with loading state, refresh button, and last-updated timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout, status tracking, and an AuthClient wrapper, exposed via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for polling bot status, config, mid price, and grid data, plus mutations for starting/stopping the bot and updating config.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a terminal-dark OKLCH color theme with Tailwind base/utilities, custom semantic tokens for buy/sell states, and scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining a dark terminal-inspired theme with custom colors (using oklch), fonts (JetBrains Mono, Inter), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing the ICP/ckUSDT trading bot built in Motoko, its architectural decisions (grid strategy, order sizing, timer loop), existing frontend/backend features, and current development phase focused on real order execution.
